name: rideold
syntax: /rideold <riders: target> start_riding <ride: target> [teleportRules: teleport_ride|teleport_rider] [howToFill: if_group_fits|until_full] | /rideold <riders: target> stop_riding | /rideold <rides: target> evict_riders | /rideold <rides: target> summon_rider <entityType: EntityType> [spawnEvent: string] [nameTag: string] | /rideold <riders: target> summon_ride <entityType: EntityType> [rideRules: no_ride_change|reassign_rides|skip_riders] [spawnEvent: string] [nameTag: string]
description: 旧版骑乘关系管理命令
bedrock_specific_notes: rideold是ride命令的旧版保留。建议使用ride命令。
